## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the contribution guidelines in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Build succeeds in both Debug and Release configurations
- [ ] Relevant tests added or updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (Unreleased section)
- [ ] PR is linked to an issue if applicable

## Testing steps
Describe how to test the change locally.

## Notes for reviewers
Any special considerations for code reviewers.
